title: festuca duriuscula var. rivularis
intro: Festuca duriuscula var. rivularis, also known as Alpine Fescue, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe and protect the skin from infections. The health benefits of Festuca duriuscula var. rivularis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin issues and infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
